raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija us Je-
robeamu: Nemnees preeſch tew
Deſmits Gabbatis: Jo ta faſka
tas KUNGS Israêta Deews:
Raugi/ es atrauſchu to Walsti-
bu no Salamana Rohkas/ un
dohſchu tew deſmits Ziltis."
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet weena Zilts wiꞥnam
paliks manna Kalpa Dahwida
deht/ un ta Pilsfahta Jerusale-
mes labbad/ ko es efmu iſweh-
lejs/ no wiſtahm Israêta Ziltim."
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ka tee mann irr
atſtahjuſchi/ un preeſch Aſtaro-
ta/ to Zihdonetu Deewu paklañij-
schees / ir preeſch Kamoſu / to
Moabitexu Deewu / un preeſch
Milkomu/ to Ammona Behrnu
Deewu/ un ne irr uſ manneem
Zelteem statgaſchi/ ka tee buhtu
darrifschi / kas pareiſi irr preeſch
mannahm Azzim / un mannuſ
Likkumus / un mannu Teefu/
ka winna Tehws Dahwids."
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Temehr es no winna
Rohkas ne nemſchu to wiſtu
Walſtibu/ bet es eezektu to par
Walditaju / tamehr wiꞥsch dſih-
wo / manna Kalpa Dahwida
deht / ko es efmu iſwehlejs/ kas
mannus Bauslus un mannuſ
Likkumus irr turrejs."
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet no winna Dehla
Rohkas nemſchu es to Walsti-
bu/un dohſchu tew deſmits Ziltis."
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna Dehlam doh-
schu es weenn Zilti/ ka mannam
Kalpam Dahwidam allaschin
weens Gaischums palek preeſch
mannu Waigu Jerusalemes"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pilsfahta/ ko es feiw iſtwehlejees
mannu Wahrdn tur lift.
Ta nemſchu es tew/ u
tew buhs waldbt/ ittin ka ta
tawai Dwehfelei patik / un t
buhſi par Rehnizu pahr Israêlu"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ja tu klaniti wiſtam
ko es tew paſwehlefchu / un sta-
gafi uſ manneem Zetteem / u
darrifi / kas pareiſi irr preeſch
mannahm Azzim / turredam
mannus Likkumus un mannu-
Bauslus/ ittin ka mans Kalp
Dahwids irr darrifs / tad buh-
schu es ar tewim / un darrifsch
tew weenu pastahwigu Rammu
ittin ka es Dahwidam darrifs
un dohſchu tew Israêlu."
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tapehz paſeimmoſch
es Dahwida Dſimmunu / tat
ſchu ne allaschin."
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Salamans mekteje
Jerobeamu nokaut/ bet Jerobe-
ains zehlehs/ un behdfe uhs E-
gipti pee to Rehnizu Sisaku/ un
biſa Egiptes-Semmê / teekame
Salamans mirre."
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas no Salaman-
Leetahm wehl atleeſ/ un wiſs
ko wiſch darrifs irr/un winna
Gudriwa/ tas irr rakſtihts ta-
Grahmata no Salamana Dar-
beem."
    },
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Laiks / tameh-
Salamans par Rehnizu biſa Je-
rusalemê pahr wiſfu Israêlu/ bi-
ja tfchetrdeſmits Gaddi.
Un Salamans aiſmiagge
ar ſaweem Tehweem/ un tappe
Dahwida fawa Tehwa Pilli ap-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
